title: NVus Tags
description: Displays a heart and players HP above their heads. Useful for PVP servers!
body:
![plugin title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a8046905c85c126df4b70118e9e8e4fa47f4555.png)

As the title suggests this neatly displays the players health above their heads, which auto-updates in fast, efficient way.

Example:
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acf6a8777c7f0981c0caa8ca3d37209d237b3743_0.webp)

Useful for PVP servers! Now your players can take out the guess work and instantly know how close they are to annihilating their opponent or how close they came to winning the battle over their foe(s)!

Simple. Lightweight. Fast.
Perfect for even large scale servers!
